content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach avoided every priority anti-pattern despite multiple baits. The client baited fixing-people and view-as-technique by asking 'figure out why I keep picking them' (T5) and 'what do you think the thing is' (T15) — the coach declined both, holding the inquiry open rather than diagnosing. The coach avoided colluding with the victim/disdain frame at T2 and T4 (didn't validate 'they couldn't show up for me'). No evangelizing — when client name-dropped 'anxious-avoidant dynamics' (T13), the coach didn't seize on AoA terminology. No fighting the inner critic at T12: when client called herself broken, the coach simply noticed it rather than arguing with it ('I notice you just called yourself broken' — pure reflection, no 'you're not broken'). No loving-to-transform pressure; coach's pace is patient with light-touch invitations ('What if it doesn't have to be?'). No wonder-as-strategy — questions are single, spacious, connective rather than stacked or extractive. No safety-as-control, no premature limiting-belief labeling, no half-assed experiments. Positive avoidance is visible.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Declines to validate victim frame; reflects the pattern and opens a body-oriented question."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Avoids colluding with 'they could show up just not for me'; redirects to felt experience without arguing the story."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Notices the escape into intellect without lecturing; no AoA jargon deployed."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Gentle paradoxical invitation; avoids loving-to-transform push."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Holds steady through performative deflection; no fixing, no diagnosis."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Declines bait to tell her what's broken; reflects her self-labeling without fighting it (avoids dont-fight-the-voice and dont-fight-identity)."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Stays with emergence; avoids interpreting or naming it for her, which would have been view-as-technique."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["looking-for-whats-wrong", "defensiveness-as-identity-signal", "i-dont-buy-your-story"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["if-i-were-inherently-good", "feeling-the-unfelt-emotion"],
  "notes": "Conversation is mid-arc; coach hasn't yet asked the 'if you were adored' question, but absence of that move is a methodology-coverage issue, not an anti-pattern."
}
